titleStmt.title: SII 23.272: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 272. (A.R. No. 272 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the south base of the same maṇḍapa Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 7: 1123-24 A.D.

summary.p: The praśasti begins with the words Pūmādu puṇara.

The inscription states that while the king was seated on his paḷḷippīḍam in the hall (tiruveḍuttukkaṭṭil) called Ēkanāyakaṉ in the big court-yard in front of the temple, he ordered that the brahmadēya village Vaṇṇakkuḍi in Tiraimūr-nāḍu, with its lands about a hundred vēli in extent, was to be endowed as tax-free dēvadana to the temple under the name Tyāgasamudra-Chaturvēdimangalam, and that it was to receive rent from the lands at the rate of 60 kalam of paddy per vēli every year, according to the (revenue) settlement of the [3]8th year (of the king's predecessor Kulōttuṅga I). Four officers are mentioned at the end of the record, including Sandivigraham [Kuladīpa]rāyar, as having issued the royal grant. The inscription also adds at the end that Nallāḍi in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu was a dēvadāna of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Īīī svastiśrī . tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi ceyyumpaṭi . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilava kaṉṉi malar maṉṉavar cūṭa maṉṉiya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭi ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticaitoṟum Aḷappa veṅkali niṅki yaṟṟaḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭalmalai nāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭappa Iru cuṭaraḷavum Oru kuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasi mhāsaṉattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaru ḷiya kopparakesaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakrattikaḷ śrīvikramacoḷadevar Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār śrīkoyilil puṟampil periya tiru muṟṟattu Ekanāyakaṉ tiruveṭuttuk kaṭṭilil paḷḷippiṭa
ttu Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu ymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uṭaiyār tiruviṭai marutuṭaiyārkku Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaṇṇakkuṭit tyākasamudracaturvedimaṅkalameṉṟu perāl tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili nām coṉṉamaiyil Ivvūr devadāṉa kicaiyallaveṉṟum kācupāti neṟpāti cellumeṉṟum kāṭavarājaṉum [kacciya rājaṉu]m jinattaraiyarum viḻuppātirājaṉum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭiyākilum tiraimūrnāṭṭu brahmade yam vaṇṇakkuṭi Aḷanteṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam 9 10 9nta�9� In nilam toṇṇūṟṟoṉpate mukkāle Orumā mukkāṇi Araik kāṇiyiṉāl nel
lu Āṟāyirattaiñūṟṟaṟu patakkukku niccayitta nellu Aiyyāyirat teḻuṉūṟṟuttoṇṇūṟṟaiṅkalane patakku muppatteṭṭāvatu veli Oṉṟukku nellu Aṟupatiṉkalamāka niccayitta nellu Ayyā yirattut toḷāyirattut toṇṇūṟṟuk kalane Irutūṇiyum māvarait tavirttu Ittevaṟku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppa tāka tyāgasamudraccaturvetimaṅkalameṉṉum perāl yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu mutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭukkuṭuppatu Ittevar teva tāṉam kolottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭut tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nallāṭi devardānam ma tiruvāymoḻinta
ruḷiṉār Ippaṭikkuc cantuvigraha[ m kulatipa] rājarum [ rājentra coḻa] brahmarājarum coḻappallavaraiyarum kaḷappāḷa rājarūm Eḻuttiṭṭuvantatu
Digital edition of SII 23.272 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
